project: PRJ03259 - Welltec - Welltec - Kazakhstan - 9895 - PLT_ SSD (ZeroTime / X-Y)
comment: Crew departed wellsite at 18:00 and arrived back to Aksai at 19:00. Equipment expected to arrive at base tomorrow morning.

project: PRJ03160 - SLB - SLB Denmark - GBN12 (N-12)_GBN43 (N-43) - MFC_ ZeroTime
PRJ03335 - Perenco - Wytch Farm - F-22 - MFC
comment: Operations have slipped, looking like Perenco will not be running the log until Thursday at the earliest. Crew assignment now TBC

project: PRJ03251 - Baker Hughes - Baker Hughes Qatar - NFR2-2_NFR2-5A - MFC
comment: No further communication on crew or equipment mobilisation. Standby for further instructions from Baker. Container ready for packing at Al Khor.

project: PRJ03259 - Welltec - Welltec - Kazakhstan - 9895 - PLT_ SSD (ZeroTime / X-Y)
comment: Reach surface at 12:03KT, Close in Well, Bleed off and lay down lubricator. start to clean and pack tools ready for back load to base.
